name: ios-senior-review
description: Comprehensive iOS / iPadOS / watchOS / tvOS / visionOS code review. Two dispatch modes: STANDARD — single Opus 4.6 agent that simulates BOTH the Apple App Review team AND a senior Apple platform engineer. TEAM (triggered by the exact phrase 'ios team review' or `--team`) — a team-lead Opus 4.6 agent maps the codebase, partitions it into 4-10 non-overlapping scopes, and dispatches `senior-ios-reviewer` sub-agents sequentially, then consolidates findings into one unified report. Reviews 12 dimensions across 4 tiers (App Store rejection risk, privacy, entitlements, security, HIG, accessibility, SwiftUI/UIKit patterns, deep linking & extensions, Swift quality, concurrency safety, performance & memory, platform integration). Returns evidence-tagged findings ([R] rejection / [R?] likely / [W] warning / [~] recommendation / [+] praise) with submission and engineering verdicts.
